name: Simple Inbound Exclusion
description: Basic scenario with one client having a single inbound exclusion. Client 0 excludes client 1 from round 1 onwards indefinitely.

expected_tracks.global: Global track (for clients 1, 2, 3, 4 without specific disagreements)

round_1_rules.description: Clients 1, 2, 3, 4 should be on the global track
